description:
This event bundle contains 50 items commemorating players and organizations participating in the ELEAGUE Atlanta 2017 CS:GO Major Championship:
 ● One sticker for each of the 16 participating teams.
 ● One graffiti for each of the 16 participating teams.
 ● One player autograph capsule for each of the 16 participating teams.
 ● One ELEAGUE sticker.
 ● One ELEAGUE graffiti.
   (Does not include Legends/Challengers holo/foil capsules.)

50% of the proceeds from the sale of this event bundle support the included players and organizations.
name: Atlanta 2017 Mega Bundle
